titleStmt.title: SII 7.801: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 801. (A.R. No. 174 of 1902). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum poṟccayap pāvaiyuñ cirttaṉiccelviyu n=ta ṉ perunteviyarāki(y) Inpuṟu neṭutuyar Ūḻiyil liṭatuṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkkarumuraṉ maṇṇaikka-kamum porukaṭal liḻattaraiyar tam muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyar roṅkeḻil muṭiyum munṉa
varpakkal tenṉavan vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyu(m) minti raṉāramun n=te ṇṭirai yiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu meṟipaṭai keraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval pal paḻan=ti vum ceruvil ciṉavil yirupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman melvaruñ cān=ti maṟṟivaraṇ karutiyirutti
ya cempoṟṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkan ṉaḷapperumpukaḻoṭum piṭiya yilaṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamum ṉavaṉeti kkulapperumalaikaḷum vikkirama vira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭavaḷa nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaipaḻana mācuṇitecamum ĀyilRead ayāvil.va
ṇkirtti ṉakaravaiyil can=ti ran tolkulat tintirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyum(ṅ) kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭaviṣai yamum śrīcurarcer nalkocalaināṭum tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaḷai vaṇṭuṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum yiraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟat tākki tikkaṉaikirt
ti takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=ta can=ta ṉ māviḻi n=to ṭa taṅkātacāral vaṅkaāḷatecamu(m) n=to ṭukaṭal caṅkoṭṭalmayi(l)pālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭirpaṇṭāramum ṉittilaneṭuṅkaṭal luttiralāṭa mum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭalnaṭuvuḷ palakalañ celutti caṅkarāmavijaiyottuṅkapanma (maṉ)ṉākiya kiṭārattaraicaṉai vākaiyam po
rukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyil piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉa(ṉa)kanakarp porttoḻil vācalil viccātirattoraṇamum mottoḻil puṉamaṇi putavamum kaṉamaṇi kkatavamum niṟai śrīvijaiyamum tuṟainirp paṉṉaiyum maṉmalaimuraiyiṟRead vaṉmalaiyūreyiṟ.RoṉmalaiyUrum AzkaTa(l) lakazcUz mAyiṉaTiṅkamumRead māyiruṭiṅkamum. kalaṅkā valviṉai yilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu
niṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamum kāvalampuricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippan tūṟuṭai vaḷaippain tūṟum kalaittakkoṟ pukaḻ talaittakkolamum(t) titamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmurikkaṭun=ti ṟa(l) lilāmuritecamum teṉakkavārpoḻil māṉakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟkkāvaṟ kaṭumuraḷ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟk koṇṭa kopparakesa ripanma rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājendra co
ḻade varkku yāṇṭu 10 7Āvatu jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu pavittiramāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu vākūrāṉa Aḻakiyacoḻacaturvve timaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār śrīmūlastā ṉamuṭaiya mahāde vaṟkku mahāsabhai yom Innilam vaḻikkollainilam paṉṉiraṇṭu māvum Ide varkku tiruppatiyam pāṭuvār nālvarkkum ḷukku tirupparicaṭṭaṅkaḷukkum nivan=ta māvatākavum kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaṉtirunan=ta vāṉattilum śrī
madhu rān=ta kaṉ tirunan=ta vānattilum Amutu pilā Oṉṟum Amutu mā Oṉṟum Amutu teṅku Oṉṟum pūmaraṅkaḷum nīṅkalāka niṉṟa māvum pilāvum teṅkum maṟṟum palamaraṅkaḷum Āṭu pattum piṭilikaivāri Araikkālp poṉṉukku kiḻppaṭṭa poṉṉum Ikkoyilil civabrāhma ṇarkaḷ kaiyuṟṟu tāṅkaḷ Anubha vittu Iccivabrāhma ṇarkaḷ can=ti rātittavaṟ Erikkakaṭava tirunon=tā viḷakku
muṉṟum nampirāṭṭiyār Arin=ta vaṉma hāde viyār peṇṭāṭṭi pūvaṉnaḻaku vaitta tirunon=tā viḷakku Oṉṟiṉā lāṭu toṇṇūṟum can=ti rātittavaṟ panma (h)ā- yeśvara rakṣai . Imma hāde vaṟke Ivvūr melpiṭākai Aviyannū(r)ṟceri Irukkum paḷḷi kecaṉ centan vaitta tirunan=tā viḷakku Arai .
Digital edition of SII 7.801 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
